Rarity: Common

    Expansion: Not Set
    Yield: 1 x Bottle of Kalish

# Apr 12 2006 at 11:30 PM Rating: Default
MarioGreymist
5 posts
Does anyone know the brewing formula for it?
▲ Page top
RE: request
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2006 at 1:53 AM Rating: Good
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
Brewing Components:
bottle, fruit, vegetables, water flask
In:
brew barrel, tanaan brew barrel, portable drink barrel, collapsible distillery
Yield: 1
On Failure Returns: bottle
Trivial at: 31

Compliments of EQTraders
http://www.eqtraders.com

Pain Mistress Okami L`Assundre of Tarew Marr

▲ Page top
PoK
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2003 at 9:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362418899
4 posts
i never saw the bottle of kalish drop in misty, but it can be bought from Wilacor Goldenmead in the PoK at -43.77, -154.10. it's also a common enough drop in high keep and can be found randomly at the merchants. my rogue halfling around lvl 9 conned indifferent to the guards in highhold pass and high keep, but i used sneak and hide to get past the mobs.
▲ Page top
RE: PoK
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2003 at 1:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791574589
6 posts
Kalish drops in misty quite often. Almost all of my characters have been halflings, and let me tell you, nobody drinks more than the Runnyeye Goblins. One day I was scoring some bottle of booze of almost every other goblin...I was missing backstabs left and right in no time. The main drink goblins drop is kalish.....which is not bad considering its made by those green skinned cretins. When in town, be sure to sample some of Lendel's Grande Lager at the Fool's Gold, brewed by the rogue guildmaster himself, best brew east of Highpass. (And if you're 'in' with the right people, you can even find some Blackburrow Stout!!)
▲ Page top
